title: Home&Back
description: A mod created with AI assistance that allows players to mark a Home location and teleport back to their death spot. I will continuously maintain and update versions, and the current version is fabric 1.21.8.
body:
The **Home&Back** mod enables players to mark a Home location and teleport back to their death spot. Though created with AI assistance, I'll keep maintaining and updating it. The current version is fabric 1.21.8, and available commands include: 
/sethome
/home
/homedel
/homelist
/homes
/hometp
/back


“Home&Back”模组允许玩家设置无限个“家园位置”，以及back到自己死亡的地方。虽然这个模组是借助AI技术开发的，但我会继续对其进行维护和更新。当前版本为1.21.8，可使用的命令包括：/sethome、/home、/homedel、/homelist、/homes、/hometp、/back。
